Assembly: The assembly icAplInca1.hap1.1 is based on 103x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Chromosome X was identified by copy number in the diploid assembly. No Y chromosome could be identified. The Y may be comprised of sequences found in the unplaced scaffolds or the species may be XO. Order and orientation of scaffolds on Chromosome 4 from ~13.58-13.90Mb and Chromosome X from ~1.31-4.11Mb and 49.37-53.21Mb is unsure.
